items.name: Blue-horizon-airline-service
items.description: Blue Horizon Airline Reservation System is a full-stack web app built with Node.js, Express.js, SQL Server, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It allows users to register, log in, search flights, book tickets, select seats, make payments, and view booking history, while admins can manage flights, users, and notifications securely.
